text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature and I come to the shrine to wish for
success in her upcoming senior year.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's write that thingy—the one you hang
on the rack.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's important to write wishes down. You don't
want to get in a divine argument about what you
said and what you didn't.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do as she suggests and write my wish down. My
wish is...
choice_data_list: For Nice Nature to stay healthy.
For Nice Nature to grow even more as a racer.
For Nice Nature to learn a new skill.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Under any circumstances, health is wealth. I wish
for Nice Nature's good health so that she can run
throughout the year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She still needs to be stronger to make her dreams
come true. I wish for the future she desires to
have.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature has become capable of so many
things now. I wish for her further growth.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You sure took your time writing that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I get it, you're at the age where you start to have
many concerns.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I bet you wished for your back pain to disappear
or for better sleep, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Then... for a bigger paycheck? For a house? What
was it?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Your wish was about me? Uhhhh...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You don't... have to care so much about me on
holidays.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You have your own life too.
choice_data_list: Right now, your success is my top priority!
Right now, your success is my top priority!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: T-top priority?! Me?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You always do this... I bet you don't even care
how I feel hearing that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay! My success, huh? All right! That's a pretty
hefty demand, but I'll try!
choice_data_list: We have another big goal too.
We have another big goal too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah! Right. The Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's... another hefty goal. I really do need
to work hard.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...At some point, we should visit the Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, I remember Nice Nature was talking to
two members of the Mejiro family after the Arima
Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We'll show you something more affirmative than
words. That will probably be all you need.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I think that "something" is the clue for what will
make me faster.
